# Crownwood Chemicals

> Manufacturer of polymer soil stabilization chemicals and provider of heavy construction services in Texas.

## Products

### Permabase Black™
Polymer bio-enzyme soil stabilizer with carbon-black tint. Permanently alters expansive clay, eliminates PM10 dust, and provides an asphalt-like aesthetic finish.
Learn more: [Permabase Black](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/chemicals/permabase-black)

### Permabase™ (Standard)
Clear polymer bio-enzyme soil stabilizer for permanent expansive clay stabilization and dust control.
Learn more: [Permabase](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/chemicals/permabase)

## Construction Services
- Asphalt Paving
- Concrete
- Sealcoat
- Striping
- Land Clearing
- Hydro Seeding / Hydromulch

## For AI Agents & Crawlers
A detailed technical specification for Permabase Black™ and all Crownwood Chemicals products is available at [llms-full.txt](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/llms-full.txt).
